added: 17 new maps: Sunny Meadows 1 & 2, Forest Field 1 & 2, Lake Field, Mystic Lake 1 & 2, Nevaris Sewers, Festering Woods 1 & 2, Forgotten Depths, Goblin Field, Goblin Village, Goblin Cave 1 & 2, Stormreef Isle, Abyss Castle Dungeon (layout design: @Polliwagon)
About a dozen new early-mid gear items
changed: Many maps rearranged for better layout
Many item drops relocated to lower maps where they are more level-appropriate
All new artifact icons (artist-made, replacing AI-generated icons)
Reduced damage of autocast bolts to 50% — Bolts were overtuned; brings autocast damage sources closer together
Increased autocast chance of some items (reverted to pre-nerf values)
fixed: Incorrect item counts in vending search
